title: Top B.Sc (Hons.) Computer Science College in Noida
content: BSc Computer Science is one of the most popular programmes in the IT domain. This field has the potential to propel your career. It is a consistently growing field with a large variety of job opportunities both in India and abroad as the industry and demand grow. Students will master in-demand computing skills, solve complex problems, and hone innovation and creativity. The hands-on project-based approach provided through this program will help the students to develop the technical and transferable skills needed for a fulfilling career in their field. XII with Science with minimum 50% marks. (Maths or Computer Application as a subject in XII) Students with a CUET / SAT (DI Code - 71057 ) score will be given preference in the merit list For Migration from Other Universities: 1) B.Sc (Hons/Hons with Research) Computer Science Ist yr. minimum 50% marks or 5.0 CGPA on a 10 point scale 2) XII with Science with minimum 50% marks. (Maths or Computer Application as a subject in XII) 01 02 Analyze and synthesis computing systems through quantitative and qualitative techniques. 03 04 05 06 To Develop practical skills to provide solutions to industry, society and business. 07 Understand environmental issues and lead a life with concerns for environment. 08 09 10 Communicate effectively in both verbal and written form. 11 12 01 02 03 Undertake higher education at institutions of transnational reputation. 01 02 XII with Science with minimum 50% marks.
